steps.prompt:
Rewrite mobile/app/meal/add.tsx with a clean, modern design. Read the current file first.

Fix these problems:
1. ALL 3 modes (search, detail, manual) MUST wrap in SafeAreaView style={{ flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#F8FAFC' }}
2. Replace ugly #4CAF50 with #10B981 everywhere
3. Add proper card shadows to all content blocks
4. Detail mode: show nutrients in a 2x2 colored grid (cal=#F59E0B, protein=#10B981, carbs=#3B82F6, fat=#EF4444)
5. Search mode header: title left, '+ 직접 등록' right as small green text
6. Results/recent items: white card style with rounded corners
7. Serving counter: bigger pill-shaped buttons

Style constants:
- BG='#F8FAFC', CARD='#FFFFFF', PRIMARY='#10B981'
- TEXT='#0F172A', TEXT2='#64748B'
- SHADOW={ shadowColor:'#000', shadowOpacity:0.06, shadowRadius:8, shadowOffset:{width:0,height:2}, elevation:3 }

Keep all existing functionality intact. Keep imports from foodApi and recentFoods. Output code only.
steps.verify: cd mobile && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true

steps.prompt: Review mobile/app/meal/add.tsx redesign. Check: 1) SafeAreaView on ALL 3 modes 2) Color #10B981 not #4CAF50 3) Card shadows 4) Nutrient grid colored 5) Korean text 6) No className on SafeAreaView. Score 1-10. SafeAreaView missing = score 0.
